title: nicotiana parviflora
intro: Nicotiana parviflora, also known as the small flower tobacco or black jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Australia and Asia, belonging to the family Solanaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nicotiana parviflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory conditions such as asthma and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
